metadata.description: Application name used in resource naming
Override database name (UAT uses RG name; prod uses default sqldb-cadence-{env})
Entra ID admin login email for SQL Server
Entra ID admin object ID for SQL Server
Frontend URL for CORS and auth redirect (e.g., https://uat-cadence.cobrasoftware.com)
Custom email domain (e.g., cobrasoftware.com). Leave empty to use Azure managed domain only.
Email for Defender for Cloud security alerts (deploy defender.bicep separately)
Override Static Web App name (UAT: stapp-refapp-uat)
GitHub repository URL for Static Web App
Azure Communication Services connection string for email

properties.administrators: [if(not(equals(parameters('entraAdminObjectId'), '')), createObject('administratorType', 'ActiveDirectory', 'azureADOnlyAuthentication', false(), 'login', parameters('entraAdminLogin'), 'sid', parameters('entraAdminObjectId'), 'tenantId', subscription().tenantId, 'principalType', 'User'), null())]

connectionString.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName')), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('databaseName'), parameters('adminLogin'), parameters('adminPassword'))]
